title: 7 Stocks to Sell Before the Fed Gets Too Aggressive in 2022
text: Equity markets tend to perform poorly during rising interest rates. Here are seven stocks to sell before the Fed gets too aggressive.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: GoDaddy's (GDDY) first-quarter results reflect strong momentum across applications & commerce and the core platform.

title: GoDaddy Inc. (GDDY) CEO Aman Bhutani on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 4, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Christie Masoner - Senior Director of Investor Relations Aman Bhutani - Chief Executive Officer Mark McCaffrey - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Trevor Young - Barclays Clarke Jeffries - Piper Sandler Ygal Arounian - Wedbush Mark Zgutowicz - Benchmark Aaron Kessler - Raymond James Elizabeth Porter - Morgan Stanley Brent Thill - Jefferies Sunil Rajgopal - Berenberg Christie Masoner Good afternoon and thank you for joining us for GoDaddy's First Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. I'm Christie Masoner, Senior Director of Investor Relations.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Lags Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -2.38% and 1.45%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
